---
title: "Ticlext Altihaf"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/77704356?v=4
about:
  template: jolla
  links:

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yusuf-sekhan-althaf/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Ticlext-Altihaf
    - icon: envelope
      text: yusufsekhanalthaf@gmail.com
      href: mailto:yusufsekhanalthaf@gmail.com

---

Principal software engineer writing about systems, incentives, and complexity across domains.

Currently working on enterprise software systems.
